I'm really glad you're reading this, because we need volunteer developers to help this project come to fruition.

Currently the project is a small team. Propably a team of one....

If you haven't already

The reason this became a passion of mine is that the internet has very little tools that truely aid Developers in making the Integration Testing and development of Software simple and easier to maintain. 

JMock an Hamcrest are my inspiration and when I started this they did not exist!
